description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks painted a muted grayish-green, accented by dark brown trim around the windows and door. The front facade features a single door to the left, a medium-sized window to the right, and a small mailbox mounted beside the door. The side and rear views reveal additional windows of varying sizes, with the rear side having a utility box attached near the base. The roof has a moderate overhang, and the structure sits on a slightly raised foundation. The overall appearance is simple and functional, suitable for residential or small-scale urban use.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a dark gable roof, gray plank siding, and brown-trimmed windows and door. The design is simple and functional, with a modest urban residential feel.
description_view_0: The narrow end of the cabin shows a single window with brown trim centered on the wall beneath the gable roof.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance door on the left, a mailbox, and a medium-sized window to the right, all beneath the overhanging roof.
description_view_2: The rear view features a plain wall with horizontal siding, a utility box near the base, and no windows or doors.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the cabin has two windows: a large one on the left and a smaller one on the right, both with brown trim.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhang, covered in dark asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Four windows in total: one medium-sized window on the front, one large and one small window on the side, and one medium window on the opposite end, all rectangular and asymmetrically distributed
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the left side of the front facade, adjacent to a mailbox and window
